steps.title: Identify the highest bar
steps.content: The question asks for the highest percentage of lithium recovered. The graph displays four bars—two battery types (A and B), each tested with two different recycling processes (1 and 2). The tallest bar clearly stands out: Type B with recycling process 2.

steps.title: Read the value from the y-axis and match
steps.content: The tallest bar reaches the 75% mark on the y-axis. The other three bars are all substantially lower—ranging from roughly 30% to 55%—making them poor matches for “highest.” That matches choice B — B is correct.
